series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains document which are relevant to the acquisition of land and utility relocation used for The Department of Transportation projects. The complete list of records included in this series may be found in the Ohio Department of Transportation, Real Estate Acquisition Manual under Section 5800 Records Retention.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Scan paper documents into electronic when received. paper documents scanned images are checked quality and completeness. ; Microform: microfilm permanently. This will only apply files created prior availability of electronic scanning and uploading. ; Electronic: images of entire file . images that evidence vesting of title a parcel in Department as long as Department owns parcel
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Permanent ; Electronic: Delete
